label: Shorts shelf (home)
_note: RELIABLE, no login. If this hits 0, YouTube changed the Shorts DOM - your shorts filter is probably leaking. YT is your free tier, so this is the most important check.

label: Mobile nav present (sanity)
_note: Confirms we got the real mobile DOM (not a consent/bot wall). If THIS is 0, the run itself is suspect, not your selectors.

label: Feed video cards
_note: RELIABLE, no login. 0 here means TikTok changed its feed DOM - the messaging-only wall may be leaking.

label: Reels nav link
_note: Needs login (set IG_USERNAME/IG_PASSWORD secrets, BURNER account). Often checkpointed in CI - if it skips, fall back to the in-app report + a manual check.

label: Reels viewer / explore
_note: Explore grid surface. Logged-out IG walls this, hence auth.
